raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current focus","name":"What's been most on your mind at work lately?","description":"Opens the conversation to understand Priya's current focus and concerns.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Post-launch reflection","name":"Now that the payments refactor is done, what stands out to you looking back?","description":"Encourages reflection on the payments refactor experience and its impact.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Energy assessment","name":"Where is your energy actually at after the refactor, and what's driving that?","description":"Probes for current energy levels and underlying causes.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Mentoring vision","name":"What would mentoring actually look like in your week, and what would you need to drop to make space for it?","description":"Explores Priya's interest in mentoring and how it fits into her schedule.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Future project interest","name":"What kind of project would you want to take on next quarter?","description":"Surfaces Priya's preferences and aspirations for future projects.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support needs","name":"What support would you need to feel ready for upcoming projects?","description":"Identifies resources or assistance Priya might require for future responsibilities.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Recognition feedback","name":"Did the recognition for the refactor land properly for you, or did anything feel missing?","description":"Assesses whether Priya feels adequately recognized for the refactor success.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Upcoming challenges","name":"What concerns do you have about the next big project that could slow us down later?","description":"Helps identify potential issues with future projects before they arise.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Personal growth","name":"Where do you see the biggest gap between where you are now and where you want to be in 12 months?","description":"Encourages Priya to think about her development and growth trajectory.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Current blockers","name":"What's currently slowing you down, and what part of that is within your control vs needs escalation?","description":"Identifies current obstacles and distinguishes between internal and external factors.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
